title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Nami, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UITH LITH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UITH LITH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is so bad...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're up against the crew of a "Yonko"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've been understanding these guys greatly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even Luffy was overpowered by one of her underlings!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!!! Run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UITH UITH UITH! HOLD YOUR HORSES, DARLING! YOU SHOULD BE MORE CONCERNED ABOUT ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...And me-ju!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know exactly what you're feeling... you're terrified, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UITH UITH... The so called "Worst Genera- lion"?! Tell me... just what exactly is supposed to be "The Worst" about you all?! All You've Really managed to do is get your fifteen minutes of fame during your journey along the first half of the Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't tell you the countless pirates I've witnessed in my lifetime who would confidently boast and ramble on about how their captain would become the next "pirate King".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, without fail, each and every time, the would hit the proverbial wall and their expressions would quickly turn to despair just like yours has!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it... during these past 2 years... a few of your colleagues had the misfortune of wandering into Mama's territory!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Captain Kid" ... yapoo, the roar of the sea" ... "Gang Bege" ... and "wronge the mad Monk"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Other than Bege, who quickly realized where he stood in the pecking order and quickly came to the understanding that becoming one of our subordinates was in his best interests...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each and every last one of them were swiftly 'escorted' from our territory without so much as even catching even a glimpse of Mama herself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only one who even managed to put up any semblance of a fight was urge the mad monk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That shot-nosed punk actually succeeded in taking down one of our commanders!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In case you're wondering... until that little incident took place we had 4 commanders instead of our current 3!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that was as far as he could take things. All he really accomplished was riding up mama to the point that she sent in brother cracker to put him in his place!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one escapes from this forest... I'm sure his corpse is probably noting off somewhere around here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen carefully... this place you're standing at now... is the place where all dreams come to die in New World!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Standing toe to toe with a yonko"?! hah, talk about wishful thinking!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't even get the chance to lay a finger on Mama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Infiliate the tea party?! Stop the wedding?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Getting your little friends back?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: absurd, unthinkable, and prepos- tenous!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sealed your fates... when you willingly stepped into this forest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AGHH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you shall all perish without ever even knowing what Mama looks like !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come, little girl ...Join your pals inside my "mirror world"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Noo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take my sweet, Merry time shredding all of you into pieces on the other side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Pound !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: get off of her, br[lee !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ack!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
